competitors.assessment: Official Velux Australia brand site. Not a direct competitor for installation services but competes heavily for product/brand queries. Ranks pos 1 for 'velux skylight installation' and multiple product terms. Central's status as a Premier Velux Dealer is a key differentiator.
key_weaknesses_vs_central: No installation service — refers customers to dealers
No reviews/trust signals for service quality

competitors.assessment: Primary direct competitor. Higher domain rank (217 vs 394) and better authority backlinks. Ranks for 'VELUX Technical Info & Installation Instructions' at pos 21 for 'velux skylight installation'. Has higher keyword intersections with Central than any other competitor.
key_advantages_over_central: Better quality backlink profile (478 links from 224 domains vs 56k links from 279 domains)
key_weaknesses_vs_central: Central has 5x more review count (313 vs unknown)
Central ranking ahead for 'skylights melbourne' (pos 4 vs Shire pos unknown)
Central has stronger product catalogue (121 products)
competitors.serp_gaps_to_exploit: Central should target keywords where Shire ranks but Central doesn't — particularly installation-specific terms

competitors.assessment: Large roofing company with skylights as part of broader service offering. Much larger overall keyword footprint (7,325 vs 521) driven by roofing content. Not a pure skylight competitor but shows what a broad content strategy can achieve in this niche.
competitors.key_differentiator: Central focuses exclusively on skylights — deeper expertise and trust in the niche

competitors.assessment: Direct competitor with more keywords than Central (1108 vs 521) and slightly higher domain rank (229 vs 394). Higher quality backlink profile. Ranks for 'Velux Skylights Installation A DIYer's Guide' at pos 10 for 'velux skylight installation'. Lower traffic value despite more keywords suggests weaker commercial intent coverage.
key_weaknesses_vs_central: Lower estimated traffic value despite more keywords
Likely weaker in review count and social proof

competitors.assessment: Direct competitor with lower keyword count than Central but higher traffic value per keyword (11,228 ETV vs 521 keywords = strong commercial ranking). Despite lower domain rank (132), achieves good traffic value. Ranks prominently for multiple Melbourne skylight queries in top 10.
key_weaknesses_vs_central: Lower domain rank (132 vs 394 — lower rank = less authority in DataForSEO's metric)

skylights_melbourne.insight: Three lesser-known domains ahead of Central on this primary keyword. melbourneskylights.net.au and belleskylights.com.au are not in Central's tracked competitor list — they may be worth investigating. Moving from 4 to 1 requires improving authority and content relevance.

velux_skylights_melbourne.insight: Central's position 5 for velux-specific query is strong given it's competing with the brand manufacturer.

skylight_installation_melbourne.insight: Strong position 5. Dedicated installation page would help push this further.

skylight_repair_melbourne.insight: Significant gap — no repair page = losing high commercial intent traffic.

velux_skylight_installation.insight: Low commercial value for installation business — DIY intent dominates.

competitive_content_gaps.description: Topics competitor sites rank for that Central does not currently have dedicated pages for

gaps.competitor_ranking: Multiple competitors have dedicated replacement pages
Multiple competitor sites have dedicated solar skylight pages

central_skylights.concern: 56,620 backlinks from 279 domains — extremely high link-to-domain ratio. Dominated by vtimes.com.au (45,319 links alone). Profile is low-quality directory heavy.

backlink_comparison.analysis: Central has the most referring domains (279) but the lowest domain rank (394) among key competitors. This paradox is explained by link quality — competitors have fewer but higher-quality referring domains. Shire Skylights (DR 217) with only 478 links outranks Central's domain rank despite fewer links. Quality over quantity is the clear lesson here.
backlink_comparison.recommendation: Invest in earning editorial links from home improvement publications, Melbourne real estate blogs, and architectural sites. Consider a disavow campaign for vtimes.com.au and other obvious spam directories.

not_in_initial_list_but_competitive.observation: Ranks above Central for 'skylights melbourne' (pos 3) and 'skylight installers melbourne' (pos 5) — should be added to competitor watch list
Ranking pos 15 for 'skylight installers melbourne', pos 7 for 'velux installer melbourne' — growing competitor
Ranking for 'velux installer melbourne' and 'skylight repair melbourne' — recently appeared in multiple SERPs
Owns 'skylight repair melbourne' at pos 1 — strong for repair intent

summary.competitive_position: Central Skylights holds a solid middle position in the Melbourne skylight market (pos 4-5 for primary keywords). Domain authority is the primary gap vs key competitors like Shire (DR 217) and Vivid (DR 229) despite having more total backlinks.
key_advantages: 313 x 5-star reviews — best review profile in the niche
Dedicated Velux Premier Dealer status — credibility signal
Strong blog content driving informational traffic (cost pages)
key_gaps: Domain authority (DR 394) is lower than key competitors despite more total backlinks — link quality issue
Missing dedicated repair and replacement pages that competitors own
Not ranking for 'skylight repair melbourne' — high commercial intent keyword owned by competitor
New competitors (Belle, Oculus, Luminous) entering market and ranking in multiple SERPs
recommended_competitive_actions: Build 10-15 high-quality links from home improvement/architecture publications to close DR gap with Shire and Vivid
Create dedicated repair and replacement service pages to compete for those high-intent queries
Add Belle Skylights and Luminous Skylights to ongoing competitor monitoring
Leverage 313-review advantage — feature prominently in all meta descriptions and schema
